title: solidago virgaurea subsp. jailarum
intro: Solidago virgaurea subsp. jailarum, also known as Goldenrod, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the aster family native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Goldenrod include its ability to reduce symptoms of hay fever and allergies, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Goldenrod is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to affected areas.
